【1 上市申请一览】iFind生成代码：#上市申请一览,输入参数:是否上市(iv_sfss)、申请类型(iv_sqlx)、申请状态(iv_sqzt)-iFinD数据接口
THS_DR('p04920','iv_sfss=0;iv_sqlx=0;iv_sqzt=0','p04920_f001:Y,p04920_f002:Y,p04920_f003:Y,p04920_f004:Y,p04920_f005:Y,p04920_f006:Y,p04920_f037:Y,p04920_f007:Y,p04920_f008:Y,p04920_f040:Y,p04920_f041:Y,p04920_f042:Y,p04920_f043:Y,p04920_f011:Y,p04920_f012:Y,p04920_f013:Y,p04920_f014:Y,p04920_f015:Y,p04920_f016:Y,p04920_f017:Y,p04920_f018:Y,p04920_f019:Y,p04920_f020:Y,p04920_f021:Y,p04920_f022:Y,p04920_f023:Y,p04920_f024:Y,p04920_f025:Y,p04920_f026:Y,p04920_f027:Y,p04920_f028:Y,p04920_f029:Y,p04920_f030:Y,p04920_f031:Y,p04920_f032:Y,p04920_f033:Y,p04920_f038:Y,p04920_f039:Y,p04920_f034:Y,p04920_f035:Y','format:dataframe')
【申请明细】iFind生成代码：#申请记录,输入参数:机构ID(iv_jgid:p04920_f036)-iFinD数据接口
THS_DR('p04923','iv_jgid=T004747504','p04923_f001:Y,p04923_f002:Y,p04923_f003:Y,p04923_f004:Y,p04923_f005:Y','format:dataframe')
【2 首发信息一览】iFind生成代码：#首发信息一览,输入参数:按(ttype)、开始日期(sdate)、截止日期(edate)、是否最新(sfzx)、板块成份(IFindKey)-iFinD数据接口
THS_DR('p05310','ttype=1;sdate=20240101;edate=20260614;sfzx=1;IFindKey=0001.HK,0002.HK,0003.HK,0004.HK,0005.HK,0006.HK,0007.HK,0008.HK,0008_1.HK,0009.HK,0010.HK,0011.HK,0012.HK,0013.HK,0013_1.HK,0014.HK,0015.HK,0016.HK,0017.HK,0018.HK,0019.HK,0020.HK,0020_1.HK,0021.HK,0022.HK,0023.HK,0024.HK,0025.HK,0026.HK,0027.HK,0028.HK,0029.HK,0030.HK,0031.HK,0032.HK,0033.HK,0033_1.HK,0034.HK,0035.HK,0036.HK,0037.HK,0038.HK,0039.HK,0040.HK,0041.HK,0042.HK,0043.HK,0044.HK,0045.HK,0046.HK,0047.HK,0048.HK,0048_1.HK,0049.HK,0050.HK,0051.HK,0052.HK,0053.HK,0054.HK,0055.HK,0056.HK,0057.HK,0058.HK,0059.HK,0060.HK,0061.HK,0062.HK,0063.HK,0064.HK,0064_1.HK,0065.HK,0065_1.HK,0066.HK,0066_1.HK,0067.HK,0067_1.HK,0068.HK,0068_1.HK,0069.HK,0070.HK,0071.HK,0072.HK,0072_1.HK,0073.HK,0073_1.HK,0074.HK,0075.HK,0076.HK,0077.HK,0077_1.HK,0078.HK,0079.HK,0080.HK,0080_1.HK,0081.HK,0082.HK,00823.HK,0083.HK,0084.HK,0085.HK,0086.HK,0087.HK,0088.HK,0089.HK,0090.HK,0090_1.HK,0090_2.HK,0091.HK,0092.HK,0093.HK,0094.HK,0095.HK,0095_1.HK,0096.HK,0096_1.HK,0097.HK,0098.HK,0098_1.HK,0099.HK,0100.HK,0100_1.HK,0100_2.HK,0101.HK,0102.HK,0103.HK,0104.HK,0105.HK,0106.HK,0107.HK,0108.HK,0109.HK,0110.HK,0111.HK,0112.HK,0113.HK,0114.HK,0115.HK,0116.HK,0117.HK,0117_1.HK,0118.HK,0119.HK,0120.HK,0121.HK,0122.HK,0123.HK,0124.HK,0125.HK,0126.HK,0127.HK,0128.HK,0129.HK,0130.HK,0130_1.HK,0131.HK,0132.HK,0133.HK,0135.HK,0136.HK,0137.HK,0138.HK,0139.HK,0140.HK,0141.HK,0142.HK,0143.HK,0144.HK,0145.HK,0146.HK,0147.HK,0148.HK,0149.HK,0150.HK,0150_1.HK,0151.HK,0152.HK,0153.HK,0153_1.HK,0154.HK,0155.HK,0156.HK,0157.HK,0158.HK,0159.HK,0160.HK,0161.HK,0162.HK,0163.HK,0164.HK,0165.HK,0166.HK,0167.HK,0168.HK,0169.HK,0170.HK,0171.HK,0172.HK,0173.HK,0174.HK,0175.HK,0176.HK,0177.HK,0178.HK,0179.HK,0180.HK,0181.HK,0182.HK,0183.HK,0183_1.HK,0184.HK,0185.HK,0186.HK,0187.HK,0188.HK,0189.HK,0189_1.HK,0190.HK,0191.HK,0192.HK,0193.HK,0194.HK,0195.HK,0195_1.HK,0196.HK,0196_1.HK,0197.HK,0198.HK,0199.HK,0200.HK,0201.HK,0202.HK,0203.HK,0204.HK,0205.H 【3 打新中签结果】iFind生成代码：#IPO打新中签结果,输入参数:开始日期(sdate)、截止日期(edate)-iFinD数据接口
THS_DR('p04477','sdate=20231201;edate=20260514','p04477_f001:Y,p04477_f002:Y,p04477_f003:Y,p04477_f004:Y,p04477_f005:Y,p04477_f006:Y,p04477_f007:Y,p04477_f008:Y,p04477_f009:Y,p04477_f010:Y,p04477_f011:Y,p04477_f012:Y,p04477_f013:Y,p04477_f014:Y,p04477_f015:Y,p04477_f016:Y,p04477_f017:Y,p04477_f018:Y,p04477_f019:Y,p04477_f020:Y,p04477_f021:Y,p04477_f022:Y,p04477_f023:Y','format:dataframe')
【4 孖展数据】iFind生成代码：#孖展数据,输入参数:开始日期(iv_sdate)、截止日期(iv_edate)-iFinD数据接口
THS_DR('p05551','iv_sdate=20231201;iv_edate=20260614','p05551_f001:Y,jydm_mc:Y,p05551_f002:Y,p05551_f003:Y,p05551_f004:Y,p05551_f005:Y,p05551_f006:Y,p05551_f007:Y,p05551_f008:Y','format:dataframe')
【5 基石投资者】iFind生成代码：#基石投资者,输入参数:按(ttype)、开始日期(sdate)、截止日期(edate)、是否最新(sfzx)-iFinD数据接口
THS_DR('p05309','ttype=1;sdate=20240101;edate=20260614;sfzx=1','p05309_f001:Y,p05309_f002:Y,p05309_f003:Y,p05309_f016:Y,p05309_f004:Y,p05309_f017:Y,p05309_f005:Y,p05309_f018:Y,p05309_f006:Y,p05309_f019:Y,p05309_f009:Y,p05309_f008:Y,p05309_f011:Y,p05309_f014:Y,p05309_f010:Y,p05309_f015:Y,p05309_f012:Y,p05309_f013:Y','format:dataframe')
【6 暗盘行情】iFind生成代码：
【7 港股日行情】iFind生成代码：#历史行情-港股-前收盘价;开盘价;最高价;最低价;收盘价;均价;涨跌;涨跌幅;成交量;成交额;换手率-iFinD数据接口

;expiryDate;tradeStatus;mv;vol_ratio;committee;commission_diff;pe_ttm;pbr_lf;swing;latest_price')
【9 限售股解禁明细】iFind生成代码：#限售股本解禁明细,输入参数:开始日期(sdate)、截止日期(edate)、货币类型(hblx)-iFinD数据接口
THS_DR('p03764','sdate=20240101;edate=20280101;hblx=港币','jydm:Y,jydm_mc:Y,p03764_f001:Y,p03764_f011:Y,p03764_f002:Y,p03764_f003:Y,p03764_f004:Y,p03764_f005:Y,p03764_f006:Y,p03764_f007:Y,p03764_f008:Y,p03764_f009:Y,p03764_f010:Y','format:dataframe')
【10 承销团】iFind生成代码：#承销团参与度-承销明细,输入参数:起始日期(sdate)、结束日期(edate)、承销商id(p0:p03411_f009)-iFinD数据接口
THS_DR('p03412','sdate=20240101;edate=20260514;p0=T004739399','p03412_f001:Y,p03412_f002:Y,p03412_f003:Y,p03412_f004:Y,p03412_f005:Y,p03412_f006:Y,p03412_f007:Y,p03412_f008:Y','format:dataframe')

【12 港股指数行情】iFind生成代码：#历史行情-指数-前收盘价;开盘价;最高价;最低价;收盘价;涨跌幅;成交量;成交额-iFinD数据接口
